compiler_limits_current.host_service_shadowing: If mN exists and @N is used, macro expands unless @!N force-host is used.
compiler_limits_current.extended_services_need: @700..@719 ML Basic and @730..@759 AI/Data Pipeline are active in Stage-15/16.

service_ranges.notes: BIO/protein/codon service family; no new syntax, runtime/meta service only.
3D/4D descriptors, flat index, axis0 slice, scalar/same-shape add, ND sum.
Sparse COO-like descriptor operations and sparse matrix-vector bridge.

design_decisions_required: Decide whether 128..149 remains macro-only or becomes flags/compare host range. Current source has unreachable @130..149 cases.
Raise meta id parser limit from 255 to at least 999 if file/stat/probability/numeric/complex packages are accepted as-is.
Add dispatcher branches for @260..356 statistics/AI, @360..369 probability, @390..401 numeric, @400..421 file, @440..450 complex.
Canonicalize file I/O: choose full UXM_FILE_V1 @400..421 table; do not mix with smaller v32 file patch frame without adapter.
Merge matrix advanced @180..199 into current MetaMatrix dispatch, because dispatcher already routes 160..199 to matrix.
